messages.text: The Rimewrought Stalker opens you with a limb of jagged black ice and the cold pours in after. The blow {verb} you!
The Rimewrought Stalker's ice-blade shears past you, close enough to frost your breath.
The Rimewrought Stalker impales you and the wound flashes to solid ice around its limb! The blow {verb} you!
